app.title: MinerPulse
about.title: About
about.portalHint: Client and Service subscriptions are managed on the website — register and sign in to your account.
about.uploadLogOk: Log uploaded. Download it from your account on the website.
about.donate.title: Support the project
about.donate.hint: If Miner Pulse helps you — consider thanking the developer:
updateProgress.title: Software update
auth.modalHint: Default login admin / admin did not work. Enter the miner web UI credentials to load the chip map.
auth.setupHint: Miner {ip} needs API or LuCI access for chip data.
auth.statusLuciUnreachable: LuCI web interface is not reachable.
auth.statusLuciAuthFail: LuCI login failed with current credentials.
auth.cloudHint: Sign in to mpulse.bob4.fun to sync credentials across devices.
auth.invalid: Could not connect to the miner with these credentials.
auth.chipMapEmpty: Login succeeded but the chip map did not load. Check that the miner web UI (LuCI) is reachable, then click Save and read again.
auth.chipMapProtect: The miner is not reporting per-chip data (protection or stopped). Clear the fault, wait for normal mining, then read again.
toolbar.tip.continueOnUnavailable: Keep polling and recording when the miner does not respond (e.g. reboot). Metrics show zeros; status is Unavailable.
scan.title: Find miners
scan.subtitle: Choose a subnet and press Scan
scan.favoriteDuplicate: This range is already in favorites
scan.hint: Select a subnet and start scanning
scan.pickHint: Click a miner to apply its IP in the main window
scan.noMiners: No miners found in the scanned subnet. Check network, port 4028, and WhatsMiner API.
subscription.title: Miner Pulse subscription
subscription.portalHint: Register on the website, choose a plan, and get your activation code in the client portal.
subscription.codeHint: Sign in on the mpulse site and generate a code in your account.
subscription.loginHint: An active subscription is required. Otherwise you stay on Free tier.
subscription.error.network_error: Could not reach the license server
subscription.error.device_limit: Device limit reached for your subscription
status.syncFailed: Failed to sync credentials with the cloud
status.readEmpty: Miner did not respond or returned empty data
status.noData: Press Read to fetch miner data
import.title: Import file
import.dropHint: Avalon/Antminer log (.txt/.log), recording (.mprs), frame (.mpsn), or legacy .mpulse
chips.lazyChip: Lazy chip (< 50% of board max solutions)
errors.name: Name
errors.unknownAction: Cross-check the code with MicroBT documentation or contact service.
console.title: Console
chips.empty: No chip map data for this miner
chips.wm.status.healthy.title: ✓ Chip healthy
chips.wm.status.healthy.body: Hashrate on target (pct {pct}%). No CRC, PLL within normal range.
chips.wm.status.ramping.title: ↗ Frequency ramping
chips.wm.status.ramping.body: Chip still reaching target frequency (pct {pct}%). Normal after boot or profile change.
chips.wm.status.underperforming.title: ↓ Low performance
chips.wm.status.underperforming.body: Hashrate below expected (pct {pct}%, nonce deficit {deficit}%). Check temperature and domain power.
chips.wm.status.pllElevated.title: ⚠ Elevated PLL errors
chips.wm.status.pllElevated.body: Chip is hashing but accumulated many PLL/splash errors ({pll}). Watch for pct drop — repair candidate if it worsens.
chips.wm.status.pllHigh.title: ⚠ Critical PLL errors
chips.wm.status.pllHigh.body: Very high PLL/splash count ({pll}). Chip may be degrading — compare with neighbors, check contact and cooling.
chips.wm.status.crcFault.title: ✗ CRC errors
chips.wm.status.crcFault.body: CRC errors detected ({crc}) — data integrity failure on the chain. Check bus, domain power, and chip solder joints.
chips.wm.status.repeatHigh.title: ↻ High repeat count
chips.wm.status.repeatHigh.body: Frequent init retries ({repeat}) with PLL errors ({pll}). Possible unstable chip communication.
chips.wm.status.tempHigh.title: 🌡 High temperature
chips.wm.status.tempHigh.body: Chip temperature {temp}°C is above neighbors. Check thermal paste, heatsink pressure, and airflow.
chips.wm.status.tempCritical.title: 🌡 Critical overheat
chips.wm.status.tempCritical.body: Temperature {temp}°C is near protection limit. Reduce load or improve cooling immediately.
chips.wm.status.deadChip.title: ✗ Chip not hashing
chips.wm.status.deadChip.body: Nonce far below board average (deficit {deficit}%). Chip likely not contributing hashrate.
chips.wm.status.mixed.title: ⚠ Multiple issues
chips.wm.status.mixed.body: Detected: {issues}. Hashrate pct {pct}%, PLL {pll}, CRC {crc}, repeat {repeat}.
charts.title: Trends
charts.empty: Start polling, recording, or open a recorded session to build charts
player.title: Session playback
commands.unsupportedVendor: Commands are not available for this miner yet
commands.invalidFreq: Frequency must be four values, e.g. 496:516:536:556
control.tabs.label: Control sections
control.pools.hint: Up to 3 pools. Pool password is not shown when reading — leave blank if unchanged.
control.advanced.netInvalid: Enter valid network settings (IP, mask, gateway, DNS).
control.advanced.factoryResetConfirm: Perform a full factory reset? The device will reboot.
control.tip.serviceRestart: Restarts the mining service (btminer) without rebooting the device.
control.tip.fanPoweroffCool: Keep fans running after mining stops for cooling.
control.tip.fanTempOffset: Fan target temperature offset from −30 to 0 °C.
control.tip.netDhcp: Obtain network settings via DHCP. When off, set a static IP.
control.tip.tempPower: Temporarily set power limit in watts until reboot.
control.tip.factoryReset: Full factory reset. The device will reboot.
control.title: Remote control
control.defaultPasswordBlocked: The saved password cannot write via API 4433.
control.superBlocked: API 4433 writes are unavailable (admin password must differ from admin/admin). Marked settings can still be changed via port 4028, like in WhatsMinerTool.
control.legend.apiWrite: * — API write via port 4028 (same as WhatsMinerTool). API Switch must be on.
control.auth.title: Admin password for API 4433
control.auth.hint: Enter the miner's current admin password (same as in WhatsMinerTool). Super in the API is a privilege level in the request, not a separate password.
control.auth.failed: Password rejected for API 4433 write. Check the admin password on the miner.
control.auth.required: This control needs the admin password and API Switch enabled.
control.apiSwitchOff: API Switch is off on the miner. Try the toggle below and Apply. If that fails, enable it manually in WhatsMinerTool (System → API).
control.apiSwitchDisabledHint: Enable API Switch with the toggle above and apply the change first.
control.apiSwitch.webAuthFailed: Could not sign in to the miner web UI. Check your web login and password (same as in the browser).
control.apiSwitch.manualRequired: This firmware cannot enable API Switch remotely (API 3.0 command is missing and the web UI has no toggle). Enable it manually in WhatsMinerTool: connect to the miner → System → API → turn on API Switch. Then refresh the state in this window.
control.apiSwitch.enableFailed: Could not enable API Switch programmatically. Turn it on manually in WhatsMinerTool or on the miner web page if available.
control.tip.mining: Starts or stops the mining service (btminer). Uses start/stop commands.
control.tip.apiSwitch: Enable or disable remote API writes (port 4028). Per MicroBT docs, enable via WhatsMinerTool.
control.tip.fastBoot: Fast boot: the miner aims to reach >85% of target power within ~10 s after start. Poor efficiency; may cause instability or power overshoot. Takes effect on the next mining service restart. Incompatible with Upfreq speed.
control.tip.webPools: Enables or disables configuring mining pools from the miner web UI.
control.tip.led.auto: Auto — LEDs follow device status (normal, error, etc.).
control.tip.powerMode.low: Low — reduced power draw and hashrate.
control.tip.powerLimit: Maximum power consumption in watts. Cannot exceed the model's rated power. The miner reboots to apply.
control.tip.targetFreq: Target frequency as % of factory default. Liquid-cooled: both directions; air-cooled: decrease only (negative %). Requires reboot.
control.tip.upfreqSpeed: Speed of frequency ramp to stable hashrate. 0 = normal, 9 = fastest. Higher = faster start but more deviation from target and less stability. Incompatible with Fast Boot.
control.tip.powerPercent: Adjusts power to a % of initial stable power. Approximate; too low may cause instability. Effective after frequency tuning ends; not saved across reboot.
control.tip.restore: Restores factory miner settings (network, passwords, pools, power mode, etc.). Device reboots.
control.tip.exportLog: Saves the miner diagnostic log to a file on your computer.
control.password.title: Change admin password (API)
control.password.hint: Per WhatsMiner docs, set.* commands (API 4433) require a non-default admin password (not admin/admin) and API Switch enabled. This is the same password as in WhatsMinerTool — super in the API is a privilege level in the request, not a separate password. MinerPulse saves the new password locally after change; store it securely.
control.password.required: A non-default admin password is required for API 4433 writes.
control.password.tooShort: Password must be at least 4 characters.
control.password.success: Admin password changed and saved locally.
control.password.failed: Could not change the password. Check the current password (Enter password).
control.password.sameAsCurrent: New password matches the current one.
control.password.defaultBlocked: API 4433 cannot change the password while admin/admin is still active. Set a new password once in WhatsMinerTool or the miner web UI, then try again here.
control.pendingChanges: Unsaved changes — click Apply to send to the miner.
control.exportConfirm: Export miner log to a file?
control.verifyFailed: The miner did not confirm the new value in time.
control.phase.verifying: Waiting for the parameter to update…
control.phase.waitingOnline: Waiting for the miner to come back online…
control.reboot.hint: This change may require a miner reboot to take effect.
control.reboot.dismissed: Changes were sent; reboot later to apply fully.
control.monitor.timeout: Timed out waiting for the miner to apply settings.
control.monitor.offlineTimeout: Miner did not come back online in time.
